tuning: D G C F A D
content:
[Intro]
|[ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]      |[ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      |
|[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       |


[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you, there's no change[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
My nights and days are grey[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
If I reached out and touched the rain[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
It just wouldn't feel the same[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you, I'd be lost[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd slip down from the top[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I'd slide down so low[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Girl, you'd never, never know...[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Without you, without you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
A sailor lost at sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Without you, woman[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
The world comes down on me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you in my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd slowly wilt and die[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But with you in my  life[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But without you, without you...[/tab]


[Instrumental]
|[ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]      |[ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      |
|[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       |


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you, my hope is small[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me be me all along[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Let the fires rage inside[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Knowing someday I'd grow strong[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Without you, without you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
A sailor lost at sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]
  Without you, woman[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
The world comes down on me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you in my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd slowly wilt and die[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But with you in my  life[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But without you, without you...[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
  I could face a mountain[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
But I could never climb alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
  I could start another day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But how many, just don't know[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
  You're the reason the sun shines down[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
And the nights, they don't grow cold[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
  Only you that I'll hold when I'm young[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Only you... as we grow old[/tab]


[Solo]
|[ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]   |[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     | x3
|[ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]   |[ch]Bb[/ch]          |


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Without you in my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd slowly wilt and die[/tab]

But with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
But with you in my  life[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the reason I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But without you, without you...[/tab]
